productDisplayName: Biba Women Printed White & Purple Kurta
description: CompositionWhite and purple printed kurta made of 100% cotton, has a floral multi-coloured print, round slit neckline, red and blue placket around the neckline, extending to the chest with sequins and lace, short sleeves and a vented hemFitRegularWash careWash separately in cold waterDo not bleachDry in shadeWarm iron; do not iron on decorationsThe neckline and placket on this kurta from biba are decorated with beautiful and subtly stylish sequin work. Wear this over leggings or over trousers depending on the occasion. Smart enough to wear to the office or to a formal party, dress this kurti up by wearing bold earrings and bangles.Model statisticsThe product is a size 36 on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
